titles.en: Chapter on Slaughtering and Sacrificing and What is to Be Said During Slaughter
Chapter on Slaughtering and Sacrificing and What is to Be Said During Slaughter

segments: : «اَلنَّحْرُ فِي اَللَّبَّةِ وَ اَلذَّبْحُ فِي اَلْحَلْقِ».
arabic.text: : «اَلنَّحْرُ فِي اَللَّبَّةِ وَ اَلذَّبْحُ فِي اَلْحَلْقِ».

segments: Hadith.3079 - Muawiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: "Nahr (slaughtering a camel) is at the throat hollow, and Dhabh (slaughtering other animals) is at the hollow of the neck."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.3079 - Muawiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: "Nahr (slaughtering a camel) is at the throat hollow, and Dhabh (slaughtering other animals) is at the hollow of the neck."

narratorChain.raw: 3079 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Slaughtering and Sacrificing and What is to Be Said During Slaughter

segments: 3080 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «كُلُّ مَنْحُورٍ مَذْبُوحٍ حَرَامٌ وَ كُلُّ مَذْبُوحٍ مَنْحُورٍ حَرَامٌ ».
arabic.text: 3080 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «كُلُّ مَنْحُورٍ مَذْبُوحٍ حَرَامٌ وَ كُلُّ مَذْبُوحٍ مَنْحُورٍ حَرَامٌ ».

segments: Hadith.3080 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Every camel slaughtered in the manner of Dhabh (slaughtering at the neck) is unlawful, and every other animal slaughtered in the manner of Nahr (piercing at the throat hollow) is unlawful."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.3080 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Every camel slaughtered in the manner of Dhabh (slaughtering at the neck) is unlawful, and every other animal slaughtered in the manner of Nahr (piercing at the throat hollow) is unlawful."

titles.en: Chapter on Slaughtering and Sacrificing and What is to Be Said During Slaughter

segments: : «لاَ يَذْبَحْ لَكَ اَلْيَهُودِيُّ وَ لاَ اَلنَّصْرَانِيُّ أُضْحِيَّتَكَ وَ إِنْ كَانَتِ اِمْرَأَةٌ فَلْتَذْبَحْ لِنَفْسِهَا وَ تَسْتَقْبِلُ اَلْقِبْلَةَ وَ تَقُولُ: «وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ اَلسَّمٰاوٰاتِ وَ اَلْأَرْضَ حَنِيفاً» مُسْلِماً اَللَّهُمَّ مِنْكَ وَ لَكَ ».
arabic.text: : «لاَ يَذْبَحْ لَكَ اَلْيَهُودِيُّ وَ لاَ اَلنَّصْرَانِيُّ أُضْحِيَّتَكَ وَ إِنْ كَانَتِ اِمْرَأَةٌ فَلْتَذْبَحْ لِنَفْسِهَا وَ تَسْتَقْبِلُ اَلْقِبْلَةَ وَ تَقُولُ: «وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ اَلسَّمٰاوٰاتِ وَ اَلْأَرْضَ حَنِيفاً» مُسْلِماً اَللَّهُمَّ مِنْكَ وَ لَكَ ».

segments:
Hadith.3081 - Al-Halabi narrated from Imam (as) that he said: "A Jew or a Christian should not slaughter your sacrificial animal for you. If it is a woman, she should slaughter for herself, face the Qiblah, and say:
'I have turned my face towards the One who created the heavens and the earth, inclining to the truth, as a submitter [to Allah (swt)]. O Allah (swt), this is from You and for You.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3081 - Al-Halabi narrated from Imam (as) that he said: "A Jew or a Christian should not slaughter your sacrificial animal for you. If it is a woman, she should slaughter for herself, face the Qiblah, and say:
'I have turned my face towards the One who created the heavens and the earth, inclining to the truth, as a submitter [to Allah (swt)]. O Allah (swt), this is from You and for You.'"

narratorChain.raw: 3081 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: 3081 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Slaughtering and Sacrificing and What is to Be Said During Slaughter

segments:
اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
«۝ فَاذْكُرُوا اِسْمَ اَللّٰهِ عَلَيْهٰا صَوٰافَّ ۝» قَالَ «ذَلِكَ حِينَ تَصُفُّ لِلنَّحْرِ وَ تَرْبِطُ يَدَيْهَا مَا بَيْنَ اَلْخُفِّ إِلَى اَلرُّكْبَةِ وَ وُجُوبُ جُنُوبِهَا إِذَا وَقَعَتْ إِلَى اَلْأَرْضِ ».
arabic.text:
اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
«۝ فَاذْكُرُوا اِسْمَ اَللّٰهِ عَلَيْهٰا صَوٰافَّ ۝» قَالَ «ذَلِكَ حِينَ تَصُفُّ لِلنَّحْرِ وَ تَرْبِطُ يَدَيْهَا مَا بَيْنَ اَلْخُفِّ إِلَى اَلرُّكْبَةِ وَ وُجُوبُ جُنُوبِهَا إِذَا وَقَعَتْ إِلَى اَلْأَرْضِ ».

segments:
Hadith.3082 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Imam Abu Abdullah (as) regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "So mention the name of Allah (swt) upon them while they are lined up [for sacrifice]" (Surah Al-Hajj 22:36).
Imam (as) said: "This refers to when they are positioned for sacrifice, and their forelegs are tied from the hooves to the knees, and their sides fall to the ground after they are slaughtered."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3082 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Imam Abu Abdullah (as) regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "So mention the name of Allah (swt) upon them while they are lined up [for sacrifice]" (Surah Al-Hajj 22:36).
Imam (as) said: "This refers to when they are positioned for sacrifice, and their forelegs are tied from the hooves to the knees, and their sides fall to the ground after they are slaughtered."

narratorChain.raw: 3082 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي قَوْلِ

titles.en: Chapter on Slaughtering and Sacrificing and What is to Be Said During Slaughter

segments: 3083 - وَ سَأَلَهُ أَبُو اَلصَّبَّاحِ اَلْكِنَانِيُّ : كَيْفَ تُنْحَرُ اَلْبَدَنَةُ قَالَ «تُنْحَرُ وَ هِيَ قَائِمَةٌ مِنْ قِبَلِ اَلْيَمِينِ.
arabic.text: 3083 - وَ سَأَلَهُ أَبُو اَلصَّبَّاحِ اَلْكِنَانِيُّ : كَيْفَ تُنْحَرُ اَلْبَدَنَةُ قَالَ «تُنْحَرُ وَ هِيَ قَائِمَةٌ مِنْ قِبَلِ اَلْيَمِينِ.

segments:
Hadith.3083 - Abu al-Sabbah al-Kinani asked Imam (as): "How is the camel (badanah) to be slaughtered?"
Imam (as) replied: "It is slaughtered while standing, from its right side."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3083 - Abu al-Sabbah al-Kinani asked Imam (as): "How is the camel (badanah) to be slaughtered?"
Imam (as) replied: "It is slaughtered while standing, from its right side."

titles.en: Chapter on Slaughtering and Sacrificing and What is to Be Said During Slaughter

segments: : «إِذَا اِشْتَرَيْتَ هَدْيَكَ فَاسْتَقْبِلْ بِهِ اَلْقِبْلَةَ وَ اِنْحَرْهُ أَوِ اِذْبَحْهُ وَ قُلْ «وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ اَلسَّمٰاوٰاتِ وَ اَلْأَرْضَ حَنِيفاً» مُسْلِماً «وَ مٰا أَنَا مِنَ اَلْمُشْرِكِينَ » «إِنَّ صَلاٰتِي وَ نُسُكِي وَ مَحْيٰايَ وَ مَمٰاتِي لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ اَلْعٰالَمِينَ `لاٰ شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ بِذٰلِكَ أُمِرْتُ» وَ أَنَا مِنَ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ اَللَّهُمَّ مِنْكَ وَ لَكَ بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ وَ اَللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اَللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنِّي ثُمَّ أَمِرَّ اَلسِّكِّينَ وَ لاَ تَنْخَعْهَا حَتَّى تَمُوتَ ».
arabic.text: : «إِذَا اِشْتَرَيْتَ هَدْيَكَ فَاسْتَقْبِلْ بِهِ اَلْقِبْلَةَ وَ اِنْحَرْهُ أَوِ اِذْبَحْهُ وَ قُلْ «وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ اَلسَّمٰاوٰاتِ وَ اَلْأَرْضَ حَنِيفاً» مُسْلِماً «وَ مٰا أَنَا مِنَ اَلْمُشْرِكِينَ » «إِنَّ صَلاٰتِي وَ نُسُكِي وَ مَحْيٰايَ وَ مَمٰاتِي لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ اَلْعٰالَمِينَ `لاٰ شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ بِذٰلِكَ أُمِرْتُ» وَ أَنَا مِنَ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ اَللَّهُمَّ مِنْكَ وَ لَكَ بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ وَ اَللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اَللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنِّي ثُمَّ أَمِرَّ اَلسِّكِّينَ وَ لاَ تَنْخَعْهَا حَتَّى تَمُوتَ ».

segments:
Hadith.3084 - Muawiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Imam (as) that he said: "When you purchase your hady (sacrificial animal), face it towards the Qiblah and slaughter or sacrifice it, and say:
'I have turned my face towards the One who created the heavens and the earth, inclining to the truth, as a submitter [to Allah (swt)], and I am not among the polytheists. Indeed, my prayer, my sacrifice, my life, and my death are for Allah (swt), the Lord (azj) of the worlds. He has no partner, and with this, I have been commanded, and I am among the submitters. O Allah (swt), this is from You and for You. In name of Allah (swt), Allah (swt) is the Greatest. O Allah (swt), accept it from me.'
Then pass the knife over it, but do not sever its spinal cord until it dies."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3084 - Muawiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Imam (as) that he said: "When you purchase your hady (sacrificial animal), face it towards the Qiblah and slaughter or sacrifice it, and say:
'I have turned my face towards the One who created the heavens and the earth, inclining to the truth, as a submitter [to Allah (swt)], and I am not among the polytheists. Indeed, my prayer, my sacrifice, my life, and my death are for Allah (swt), the Lord (azj) of the worlds. He has no partner, and with this, I have been commanded, and I am among the submitters. O Allah (swt), this is from You and for You. In name of Allah (swt), Allah (swt) is the Greatest. O Allah (swt), accept it from me.'
Then pass the knife over it, but do not sever its spinal cord until it dies."

narratorChain.raw: 3084 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: 3084 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ
